dom_structure.intro: Full-screen WebGL background with minimal navigation.
dom_structure.works_grid: Overlay dynamic grid, varied thumbnail sizes, waving flag shaders.
dom_structure.project_detail: Three-panel vertical split (Description, Video, PLAY CTA).
dom_structure.navigation: JavaScript-handled SPA to maintain WebGL context.

aesthetic.visual_language: Super Premium, 30-50% opacity overlays, background video dominance.

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS (for layout) + Custom CSS (for effects)

responsive.strategy: Adaptive layout, reducing WebGL complexity on mobile, vertical stack for grids.

user_brief.context: Geoland OS is an Agent-First Decision Infrastructure for global investments.
rules: Split large paragraphs into separate slides
